      Context Context.getParent()
      Returns null if this object is a top-level context.

      Classes in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors that implement Context

      class  ActionRunner
      A simple visitor that invokes actions.
      static class  ActionRunner.Impl
      A simple implementation of an ActionRunner.
      static class  ActionRunner.WithResult 
      Methods in com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors that return Context 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Context ActionRunner.Impl.getParent()
      Returns null since this action runner is a top level one and doesn't have any parent.
